title: Pistachio Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Chinese stir fry dish made with pistachio-crusted chicken, mixed vegetables, and a sweet soy sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the wok and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the wok and set aside.
Add another tablespoon of vegetable oil to the wok and stir-fry the bell pepper, broccoli, and carrots until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger to the wok and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked chicken back into the wok and stir in the soy sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Sprinkle with chopped green onions and serve hot.
